title: You Only Get One Chance — Don’t Waste It (Ichigo Ichie)
description:
You know exactly what you need to do to change your life. Train, work on the project, study, be present with those you love... But you keep putting it all off until "tomorrow."
In this video, you'll learn the story of Dylan — a man who spent years living in the illusion of "I'll start later" until he discovered the Japanese philosophy of Ichigo Ichie: each moment exists only once in life.

I'll show you how the neuroscience of procrastination works, why your brain sabotages you every day, and the exact system Dylan used to stop procrastinating and start truly living.

📌 What you will learn:

Why you procrastinate even when you know what you should do
The neuroscience behind procrastination and how to overcome it
The 2-Minute Rule for creating any habit
How the Ichigo Ichie concept can transform your relationship with time
The complete system for building discipline without relying on motivation
Why "tomorrow" is the biggest lie you tell yourself

This is not just another motivational
